cards.rules_text:
Ward–Discard a card
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, target player sacrifices a creature of their choice. If that creature had mana value 3 or less, return it to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it.

[+1]: Draw a card and you lose 1 life.
[-3]: Each player sacrifices a creature. If you sacrificed a permanent this way, return another target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield.
[-8]: You get an emblem with “Whenever a creature dies, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. If it wasn't a token, create a 2/2 red Elemental creature token.”

cards.rules_text:
Reach, trample
When this creature enters, draw cards equal to the greatest power among other creatures you control.
[i]Stampede[/i] – Whenever this creature attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, you may cast a spell with mana value 4 or less from your hand without paying its mana cost.

[+2]: Create a 2/2 green Elemental creature token.
[-3]: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It fights target creature you don't control.
[-8]: You gain 3 life for each creature you control and get an emblem with “Creatures you control get +3/+3 and have trample.”

Other creatures you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance.
